title: Pokémon Masters Type Icons (Pixelmon Reforged)
description: Type icons from Pokémon Masters, now in Pixelmon! TCG included!
body:
A simple little resource pack that replaces the default type icons with the more detailed icons of Pokémon Masters.

Credits:-


• @MadCappedBeef of PMC for formatting the textures for the TCG update!

• Sprites sourced from Pokésprite (https://msikma.github.io/pokesprite/index.html)

• Sprites are the property of © Nintendo/Creatures Inc./GAME FREAK Inc.
